title: Thunder’s Wrath
description: Thunder’s Wrath adds a single, powerful item: the Wrathcaller, a wand capable of summoning lightning to annihilate any player or mob with one strike.
body:
# **Thunder’s Wrath**

## **Overview**
The Thunder’s Wrath mod introduces a single, game-changing item: the Wrathcaller. This wand wields the immense power of lightning, capable of striking down any enemy—whether a player or mob—in just one hit. Perfect for those seeking ultimate dominance or a quick way to deal with powerful foes, this mod delivers simplicity with devastating power.

## **Key Features**
- ### **The Wrathcaller:**
  - A custom-crafted wand imbued with the raw energy of thunderstorms.
  - Instantly kills any target with a single lightning strike.

- ### **Lightweight Mod:**
  - Adds only one item, ensuring minimal impact on game performance.

- ### **Creative and Survival Ready:**
  - Obtainable via creative mode for testing or craftable in survival . (Crafting Coming Soon.)

## **Usage**
  - Right-click to summon a deadly lightning bolt at your target's location.
  - Works on any mob or player within range.
  - Ideal for boss fights or clearing large groups of enemies.

## **Why Choose Thunder’s Wrath?**
  - Powerful: Dominate your Minecraft world with unparalleled strength.
  - Minimalist: A single-item mod that keeps your gameplay focused.

## **Compatibility:**
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.20.x (Recommended: 1.20.1)
- **Mod Loader:** Forge

# **Support Us on Patreon!**
Support us on Patreon to unlock exclusive perks! By becoming a patron, you gain early access to mod updates, special features, and a dedicated space to engage with the development team. Patrons in the VIP tier also enjoy exclusive access to our Discord community, where you can connect with other players and share your suggestions. Your support helps us continue improving and creating exciting mods for everyone. Thank you for being a part of the journey!
